A gift of wind? We shall see where it blows.
I have noticed that you respect borders. Maintain this distance.
The wind carries your coin. We shall see what it buys.
I have noticed that distance is indeed safer. Maintain it.
Thanks for the gift! Always happy to trade with a reasonable neighbor.
Agreed. Silence is a sturdy foundation.

The wind carries your gift. We see the value in this exchange.
I have noticed that distance is indeed the only guarantee of safety. We will maintain our borders.
A generous gesture. I look forward to our continued cooperation.
Indeed, prosperity is a worthy goal. Let us see how the winds blow.

inbox.text: Greetings neighbor! Let's secure our border and prosper together.
Understood. I prefer prosperity over conflict, but I will defend my interests.
No desire to clash. Best of luck expanding.

Distance preserves assets. I shall respect the boundary.
Understood. We are simply securing our own interests. Peace remains our goal.
